why_this_action.summary: During the active hold window, the highest-leverage move was to improve the scheduled post-hold rerun. The runner could execute board lanes but still skipped a selector-picked distribution_architecture_repair, which would have produced a fake board refresh instead of a concrete repair once the blocker cleared.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: active lane truth is distribution_architecture_guard_pause until 2026-05-26T08:57:00
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: board explicitly says another repair is required if it stays empty after blockers clear
outcome_execution_board_runner.py: only board lanes were treated as executable
distribution_lane_executor.py: distribution_architecture_repair and guard lanes already have executable implementations

repair.summary: Patched the execution-board runner so selector-chosen distribution architecture repair lanes actually execute, and added regression coverage for that path.
repair.expected_post_hold_effect: If the execution board is still empty after 2026-05-26T08:57:00, the scheduled runner can now perform a concrete repair instead of logging a fake-success board refresh.
